introText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Long Beach, The Azizi Firm is here to help. As a major port city with heavy commercial traffic and busy urban streets, Long Beach presents unique accident risks. We represent victims of auto accidents, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, and rideshare accidents. Our experienced car accident attorneys fight to get you maximum compensation for medical bills, lost wages, pain and suffering, and all other damages.

sections.header: Types of Car Accident Cases We Handle
sections.body: Our Long Beach car accident lawyers handle all types of motor vehicle accidents: rear-end collisions on the 710 and 405 freeways, T-bone accidents at signalized intersections, head-on collisions, hit and run accidents, drunk driving accidents, distracted driving accidents, rideshare (Uber/Lyft) accidents, truck accidents involving port drayage trucks, motorcycle accidents, pedestrian accidents along Ocean Boulevard, and bicycle accidents on dedicated bike lanes.

sections.header: Common Causes of Car Accidents in Long Beach
sections.body: Long Beach's position as one of the world's busiest port cities means a high volume of heavy truck traffic on the I-710 corridor and throughout the city. Common causes include port truck driver fatigue, distracted driving, speeding on the 405 and 710, aggressive driving near the downtown waterfront, impaired driving, and accidents at the complex 405/710 interchange. Our attorneys investigate every accident to identify all liable parties and insurance coverage.

faq.question: What should I do after a car accident in Long Beach?
faq.answer: Call 911, seek medical attention, document the scene including any port truck identifiers if a commercial truck is involved, take photos, exchange information, get witness contacts, and contact a car accident lawyer before speaking with insurance companies. Commercial truck accidents have additional evidence preservation needs.

faq.question: How much is my Long Beach car accident case worth?
faq.answer: Case value depends on injury severity, medical costs, lost wages, pain and suffering, and available insurance coverage. Cases involving commercial trucks often have higher policy limits and potentially larger recoveries. We offer free case evaluations.

whyHireText: Our founder previously defended major insurance companies, giving us insider knowledge of how they evaluate and settle claims. We have extensive experience with commercial truck accident litigation and understand the complexities of cases involving port and logistics companies.
contactUsText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Long Beach, contact The Azizi Firm today for a free, confidential consultation. No fees unless we win.
